prompt: Redesign this professional portfolio website to look like a MySpace profile from 2006, complete with a cluttered layout, custom cursor, and an embedded music player.
prompt_refined: Generate an image that transforms the professional portfolio website in image 1 into a MySpace profile from 2006. The redesign should feature a highly cluttered layout with elements like the header, navigation, and content sections (including the image gallery) appearing misaligned and overlapping. Use a vibrant, garish color palette with clashing background patterns (e.g., tiled GIFs or textures) and multiple unprofessional font styles (e.g., Comic Sans, glitter text, pixel fonts). Integrate a prominently visible, custom-skinned music player, resembling an early 2000s media player, placed in the upper-right section of the page. Display a large, animated custom cursor, such as a sparkle trail or a quirky icon, hovering near the center of the screen.
objects: Highly cluttered, misaligned, and overlapping website layout
Clashing background patterns (e.g., tiled GIFs or textures)
Multiple unprofessional font styles (e.g., Comic Sans, glitter text, pixel fonts)
Custom-skinned music player in the upper-right section
Large, animated custom cursor near the center of the screen
